name: Pilbara Gold Limited
analysis: PGL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 32% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.5750, stop A$0.5297, target A$0.6450 (1.54:1) — then trail it.
